field.products.intro: Pick your favourite flavours — your plan uses these. For longer races we'll mix them up for variety. No preference? We'll choose a balanced mix for you.

field.fuelStyle.title: Fuelling style
field.fuelStyle.gels_only.label: Gels only
field.fuelStyle.gels_only.desc: Simple and fast — gels are your primary fuel source throughout
field.fuelStyle.gels_and_bars.label: Gels + bars
field.fuelStyle.gels_and_bars.desc: Real food variety — bars for steady energy, gels when you need a boost
field.fuelStyle.drink_mix_base.label: Drink mix + gels
field.fuelStyle.drink_mix_base.desc: Continuous carbs from your bottle, gels for intensity spikes
field.fuelStyle.flexible.label: Whatever works
field.fuelStyle.flexible.desc: No strong preference — give me a solid starting plan I can adjust
field.fuelStyle.comingSoon: Lecka's carb + hydration powder is coming soon.
field.fuelStyle.waitlist: Join the waitlist to be first →
field.addons.context.extraNeeded: For races this long, your body can absorb even more if you add a second type of fuel alongside your gels.
field.addons.context.addExtra: Adding {{extra}}g/hour from the products below gets you to your full target.
field.addons.context.covered: Your Lecka gels cover your full target — the options below are optional extras.
field.addons.science.title: The science behind the limit
field.addons.science.body: Your gut absorbs glucose (from real food like Lecka) via one transporter (SGLT1), which maxes out at around 60–65g carbs/hour. A second transporter (GLUT5) handles fructose independently — so combining both types lets you absorb 90g/hour or more. Sports scientists call this the dual-transporter protocol.
field.addons.no.label: Lecka gels are enough for me
field.addons.no.desc: I'll fuel with Lecka and manage the intensity on race day. I can always adjust my plan later.
field.addons.yes.label: Add performance products
field.addons.yes.desc: I'll add high-carb products to reach my full target. Show me what athletes use.
field.addons.highCarbGelsDesc: Dual-transporter carbs to reach 75–90g/hour alongside Lecka
field.addons.realFoodDesc: Available at aid stations or easy to carry
field.addons.realFoodPhilosophy: These fit Lecka's real food philosophy — no synthetic additives

field.city.hint: Used to fetch live race-day weather (Pro plans only)

field.customDist.tooLong: That's a very long distance — your plan will be calculated as Ultra 100km+. If this looks wrong, check your distance units.
